items.title: Want Decades of Passive Income? Buy This Index Fund and Hold It Forever.
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF (VYM) is a low-cost index fund that provides a solid and growing income stream with strong total return potential. It invests in a portfolio of large-cap stocks with above-average dividend yields, offering a 2.7% yield and the potential to build significant wealth over time.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights the ETF's ability to provide a solid and growing income stream, as well as its strong total return potential, making it a good long-term investment option.
The article mentions JPMorgan Chase as one of the top holdings in the Vanguard High Dividend Yield ETF, but does not provide any specific commentary on the company.
